posts.text:
Rather than pursuing policies that would restore affordable coverage for millions of Americans, the Trump administration is promoting TrumpRx as the answer to rising health care costs.
americanprogress.org/article…

It's been nearly one year since Trump's "Liberation Day," and his tariff agenda has resulted in blue-collar job losses in nearly every state while failing to boost manufacturing or close the trade deficit in goods. ampr.gs/4rCgT3w
As Trump's SAVE America Act is debated in the Senate this week, it's important you know how this anti-voter legislation threatens to silence millions at the ballot box 🗳️ ampr.gs/4rMkcpS

Retired Major General Randy Manner was traveling in the Middle East when Trump launched the attack on Iran. He was stranded in the UAE for five days after being told "we cannot help you" by the U.S. government.

Video

With Gov. Spanberger’s signature, Virginia will become the 14th state, along with D.C., to enact a program that guarantees the right to paid family and medical leave. Get the facts on paid leave in Virginia ⤵️ 
americanprogress.org/article…

The Trump administration's attack on electric vehicles has endangered the U.S. auto industry—failing both American workers and consumers. americanprogress.org/article…

Video

In the first hours of the war in Iran, a U.S. airstrike hit an elementary school, killing 168 civilians, most of whom were children. 

Please join CAP tomorrow, March 18, as we host an online discussion on this tragedy and its implications for the U.S. military and the future of warfare. ampr.gs/4lww0dD

Communities of color are 3x more likely to live in nature-deprived areas than white communities—and it's not by accident. 

Learn more about the nature gap: americanprogress.org/article…

Video

Despite Trump's claims, no one is "winning" in his war of choice with Iran. In fact, American taxpayers are losing billions of dollars.

Video

“Gun violence is the number one cause of death for young people—and that is unacceptable.” Take action and join the work in your community today.

Video

If the Trump administration truly cared about delivering lower gasoline and energy prices to Americans, here are 4 actions it could take instead of increasing profits for the oil industry. ⬇️ 
ampr.gs/4rql1DT
